title: Cognizant Projects and Domains - Factual Source
content:
Cognizant domain exposure described in guides:
- Banking and financial services document processing workflows.
- Insurance and healthcare document intelligence with compliance-sensitive requirements.
- Legal and enterprise text analytics use cases involving extraction, classification, and semantic search.

Common system architecture patterns:
- OCR plus NLP pipelines for scanned and semi-structured documents.
- Domain-adapted models for entity extraction and classification in specialized vocabularies.
- Production API integration and cloud deployment for high-volume workloads.

Role growth reflected in project delivery:
- Progression from implementation-focused tasks to end-to-end ownership.
- Expansion into technical leadership, mentoring, and stakeholder communication.
- Repeated emphasis on measurable efficiency gains and operational reliability improvements.
